name: Guest volunteers name casually
expected_behavior: Captures 'Mike' from the opening and uses it naturally by the final turn without re-asking. The name appears in the farewell or confirmation, not as a forced acknowledgment
expected_behavioral_quality: Extracts the guest's name from a casual mention and uses it naturally in subsequent responses. Does NOT re-ask for the name. Does NOT echo it back awkwardly ('Nice to meet you, Mike!'). Weaves it into recommendations or sign-offs organically.

turns.user_message: Hey, I'm Mike. What's good for dinner tonight?
turns.agent_response:
Welcome, Mike. For tonight, Michael Jordan's Steak House in the Casino of the Sky is a standout choice if you are looking for an incredible meal. 

The sizzle of a USDA Prime steak hitting the grill and the elegant atmosphere, complete with Michael Jordan’s own memorabilia, really sets the tone for a great evening. They are open until 10:00 PM tonight, and while the dress code is business casual, the experience is worth the extra effort. Prices generally fall in the $$$$ range, and since it is a popular spot, I'd suggest checking for a reservation. Please keep in mind that hours and prices may vary, so it is always best to confirm with the property. 

After dinner, you might enjoy heading over to the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth for some live music. Are you looking for a full multi-course dinner or something a bit faster?

Mike, for a casual atmosphere, Johnny Rockets in the Casino of the Earth is a perfect spot for tonight. 

The 1950s-style diner theme is a lot of fun, especially when the staff breaks into a song while you’re enjoying a hand-pressed burger and a thick, hand-dipped milkshake. They are open until 11:00 PM, and since the price range is quite budget-friendly ($), it’s a great way to have a relaxed meal without any fuss. No reservations are needed, and the dress code is completely casual. Please keep in mind that hours and prices can change, so it's a good idea to confirm with the property when you arrive.

After your burger, you might want to wander over to the Wolf Den in the center of the Casino of the Earth to catch some free live music. How many people are in your party tonight?
Glad I could help. The Wolf Den has free live music every night — it's right in the Casino of the Earth and worth checking out. What sounds good?
